title: Producer Consumer Drift
findings: 发现 1 个新的 producer/consumer drift：store-aware MCP 契约/测试声称 6 个工具输出 store edge，但实际 runtime schemas/services 只输出旧字段或 alias-only store 信息。
issues_found: [{"title":"Store-aware MCP contract advertises provenance and written_to_store fields that runtime outputs do not produce","severity":"high","description":"`MCP_STORE_AWARE_CONTRACTS` and its tests lock a 6-tool store-aware contract where READ tools surface `global_ref`/`provenance` and WRITE tools echo `written_to_store`, and the parity matrix describes recall/sections as returning `store_uuid + alias + local_id + global_ref`. Actual output schemas/services are incompatible: `knowledgeSectionsOutputSchema.rules[]` only has `stable_id/level/path/body`, `recallOutputSchema.rules[]` only adds optional `store:{alias}`, and `FabExtractKnowledgeOutputSchema`/`extractKnowledge` return only `pending_path` and `idempotency_key`. Clients relying on the exported contract can believe store-qualified citation/write-target data exists while MCP responses omit it, especially under multi-store shadowing.","location":"Producer: packages/shared/src/schemas/mcp-store-contracts.ts:17, packages/shared/test/store/mcp-store-contracts.test.ts:11, packages/shared/src/parity/parity-matrix.json:167; Consumer/runtime: packages/shared/src/schemas/api-contracts.ts:329, packages/shared/src/schemas/api-contracts.ts:480, packages/shared/src/schemas/api-contracts.ts:826, packages/server/src/services/recall.ts:196, packages/server/src/services/extract-knowledge.ts:464","fix_direction":"Either make the real MCP output schemas and services emit the promised store edge (`global_ref`, `provenance`, and `written_to_store`) for all contracted tools, or narrow `MCP_STORE_AWARE_CONTRACTS`/parity descriptions/tests to the fields actually shipped; add contract tests that validate runtime tool outputs against the exported store-aware contract rather than only validating standalone helper schemas.","affected_components":["@fenglimg/fabric-shared MCP schemas","@fenglimg/fabric-server MCP services","parity matrix","store-aware contracts"],"tags":["producer-consumer-drift","mcp-contract","store-aware","schema-runtime-drift"]}]
